calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-31-2017 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On Defendant Andy Ka Chang Fongs Affirmative Defenses
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Deposition Questions And Production Of Documents Designated In Deposition Notice From Defendant Andy Ka Chang Fong And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alex Merchant, of Elke & Merchant LLP, Tel. 415.294.4111, for plaintiffs;
Andy Fong, in pro per, Tel. 415.309.9299, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF WAI SO, CHOR YEUNG Motion To Compel Answers To Deposition Questions And Production Of Documents Designated In Deposition Notice From Defendant Andy Ka Chang Fong And For Monetary Sanctions is partially granted. No sanctions awarded. Prevailing party to prepare the proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant Andy Ka Chang Fong And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on FRI-DEC-16-2016:
Alex Merchant, Esq. ELKE & MERCHANT LLP (T: 415.294.4111), for Plaintiffs WAI CHI SO and CHOR YEUNG;
Andy Ka Chang Fong, Defendant in Propria Persona

PLAINTIFFS WAI CHI SO and CHOR YEUNG'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses From Defendant Andy Ka Chang Fong And For Monetary Sanctions is argued, submitted, and GRANTED. The Court modifies the amount of sanctions tentatively granted from $6,460.00 to $1,000.00. Order signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah D. Lebowitz; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Set For Trial On Feb-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
